title: Cobblemon - Family Guy Character Pack
description: Small mod to add Family Guy characters as catchable Pokemon in Cobblemon
body:
![Clumpy Bros](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18687dd80feef348a9375afdcfb28892c8b76e73.png)

This is a simple mod that adds iconic Family Guy characters to Cobblemon!

The characters currently included are:
- Peter
- Brian
- Joe
- Stewie
- Quagmire

I plan to expand this pack in the near future to include:
- Lois
- Meg
- Chris
- Cleveland
- Herbert the Pervert
- Mort
- Giant Chicken

INSTALLATION:
Newer versions of this pack are packaged as mods, so just hit install and you should be good.

For older versions packaged as a datapack, place the file in both the resource pack folder AND data pack folder of your world.

Feel free to include this in your modpacks and such, no credit needed. Have fun!

[![Join our Discord!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71d7f865966f83b55f1d9158c9c1d0c617106f91.png)](https://discord.gg/NcmC8e8CvA)

[![Buy us a coffee!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66359a891f941931243d479b7574eee758c6b5da.png)](https://buymeacoffee.com/clumpybros)

[![Subscribe on YouTube!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d0fbe7b278e3c910a7728fe28af5df82532b54e.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@ClumpyBros)

_DISCLAIMER: I don't own Family Guy and Family Guy is property of Fox or Disney or whatever and this pack isn't making money so don't sue my ass_
